prompt: A powerful poster design featuring 'RISE UP' in a bold, condensed gothic font that has a cracked, distressed concrete texture. The text should appear as if carved or embedded into this surface, with subtle shadows emphasizing its depth. The background is a gritty, urban wall with peeling paint and faint spray-painted tags, evoking resilience. The composition should be squarely focused on the impactful typography.
prompt_refined: Generate a powerful poster design. Centrally featured is the text 'RISE UP', rendered in a bold, condensed gothic font. This typography has a cracked, distressed concrete texture and appears deeply carved or embedded into that very surface, with subtle shadows emphasizing its three-dimensional depth. The background is a gritty urban wall, detailed with peeling paint and faint spray-painted tags, conveying a strong sense of resilience. The composition tightly focuses on the impactful typography.
objects: Cracked, distressed concrete texture on the text
Deeply carved or embedded 3D appearance of the text
Faint spray-painted tags on the wall
